full_text:
Qin Shi Huang [Ying Zheng] 秦始皇嬴政
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Qin Shi Huang [Ying Zheng] (秦始皇嬴政). Qin dynasty. Founder and first emperor of Qin. First ruler to take the title Emperor instead of King. Qin Shi Huang [Ying Zheng] was an historic figure affiliated with Qin.
